landing.blurb: Golden Gate Software Soltions was founded in San Francisco 2023 by ex-AWS and ex-ADT software engineer Jackson Galan. He noticed an opportunity to leverage the big tech development skillset in a small business and startup context, and began to serve the software needs of a few local clients. What began as a one-person consultancy has grown into a focused development studio built around a hands-on, partnership-first approach — working closely with founders and growing teams to turn ideas into reliable, maintainable products. From early-stage prototypes to production-ready platforms, we bring senior-level craft and genuine care to every engagement, helping clients move fast, build right, and scale with confidence.
